title: Medical Equipment Preparers
description: Prepare, sterilize, install, or clean laboratory or healthcare equipment. May perform routine laboratory tasks and operate or inspect equipment.

tasks.text: Operate and maintain steam autoclaves, keeping records of loads completed, items in loads, and maintenance procedures performed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean instruments to prepare them for sterilization.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Organize and assemble routine or specialty surgical instrument trays or other sterilized supplies, filling special requests as needed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine equipment to detect leaks, worn or loose parts, or other indications of disrepair.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Report defective equipment to appropriate supervisors or staff.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain records of inventory or equipment usage and order medical instruments or supplies when inventory is low.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Stock crash carts or other medical supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Start equipment and observe gauges and equipment operation to detect malfunctions and to ensure equipment is operating to prescribed standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check sterile supplies to ensure that they are not outdated.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attend hospital in-service programs related to areas of work specialization.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Disinfect and sterilize equipment, such as respirators, hospital beds, or oxygen or dialysis equipment, using sterilizers, aerators, or washers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Purge wastes from equipment by connecting equipment to water sources and flushing water through systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Deliver equipment to specified hospital locations or to patients' residences.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assist hospital staff with patient care duties, such as providing transportation or setting up traction.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
